programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the day of Kai-ching taking office as chair, she plans to dismiss Yat-yin. Yat-yin survives the crisis for now as she takes leave. Yat-yin meets up with newly appointed AKL Bank President Tai Tak-kiu. She puts forward some amazing collaboration proposal. Interpol points out the plane crash was most probably not an accident.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: Shining Just for You
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven: Resurrection
programme.desc: Continuing the plot from the previous season of ‘The Escape of the Seven’, the sequel focuses on a man who dreams of becoming a king in a castle built on fake news and the counterattack of seven people escaping evil.

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy!
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: Gone With The Rain
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Zodiac HK Hospital Dr Tung Yat-yin, Head, Department of Cardiothoracic Surgery, has performed some extremely difficult operation, establishing an international status for the hospital. Meanwhile, Group Chairman Dr Wong Chun-to (Paul) is getting ready to marry Yat-yin in some ancient castle in Europe.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yat-yin suppresses the news about the Wongs’ private jet crash. The Wong’s third daughter Wong Kai-ching and her husband Pang Kin-pong secretly inform Chun-to’s arch enemy Or Wing-sing as they want Zodiac HK Hospital to stop operating. Yat-yin eventually reveals everything she knows as she is interrogated by Yi-ka and Lai-suet.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] While Yi-ka and Lai-suet are mourning the loss of loved ones, Yat-yin has overcome her sadness as she faces a looming disaster initiated by Zodiac Group. Yat-yin arbitrarily lures senior official Mok Hong-yiu into letting Zodiac Medical City sail through the bidding.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] At the memorial service, Wing-sing abruptly turns up and announces he has gained the support of other shareholders. A special directors’ meeting will be held to reelect members and group chairman. Yat-yin wants to prevent Wing-sing from joining the board of directors, and she needs enough shares to enable her to join the board, so she tries to win Yi-ka and Lai-suet over.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the day of Kai-ching taking office as chair, she plans to dismiss Yat-yin. Yat-yin survives the crisis for now as she takes leave. Yat-yin meets up with newly appointed AKL Bank President Tai Tak-kiu. She puts forward some amazing collaboration proposal. Interpol points out the plane crash was most probably not an accident.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: Gone With The Rain
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the day of Kai-ching taking office as chair, she plans to dismiss Yat-yin. Yat-yin survives the crisis for now as she takes leave. Yat-yin meets up with newly appointed AKL Bank President Tai Tak-kiu. She puts forward some amazing collaboration proposal. Interpol points out the plane crash was most probably not an accident.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: Shining Just for You
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven: Resurrection
programme.desc: Continuing the plot from the previous season of ‘The Escape of the Seven’, the sequel focuses on a man who dreams of becoming a king in a castle built on fake news and the counterattack of seven people escaping evil.

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy!
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Gone With The Rain
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Zodiac HK Hospital Dr Tung Yat-yin, Head, Department of Cardiothoracic Surgery, has performed some extremely difficult operation, establishing an international status for the hospital. Meanwhile, Group Chairman Dr Wong Chun-to (Paul) is getting ready to marry Yat-yin in some ancient castle in Europe.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yat-yin suppresses the news about the Wongs’ private jet crash. The Wong’s third daughter Wong Kai-ching and her husband Pang Kin-pong secretly inform Chun-to’s arch enemy Or Wing-sing as they want Zodiac HK Hospital to stop operating. Yat-yin eventually reveals everything she knows as she is interrogated by Yi-ka and Lai-suet.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] While Yi-ka and Lai-suet are mourning the loss of loved ones, Yat-yin has overcome her sadness as she faces a looming disaster initiated by Zodiac Group. Yat-yin arbitrarily lures senior official Mok Hong-yiu into letting Zodiac Medical City sail through the bidding.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] At the memorial service, Wing-sing abruptly turns up and announces he has gained the support of other shareholders. A special directors’ meeting will be held to reelect members and group chairman. Yat-yin wants to prevent Wing-sing from joining the board of directors, and she needs enough shares to enable her to join the board, so she tries to win Yi-ka and Lai-suet over.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the day of Kai-ching taking office as chair, she plans to dismiss Yat-yin. Yat-yin survives the crisis for now as she takes leave. Yat-yin meets up with newly appointed AKL Bank President Tai Tak-kiu. She puts forward some amazing collaboration proposal. Interpol points out the plane crash was most probably not an accident.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 花甲少年趣旅行 吃喝玩乐全攻略
programme.desc: 全明星跨世代旅游实境节目，纪录跨世代的艺人们难忘的友情之旅！

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: 梦想街57号-预约你的梦想
programme.desc: 更专业、更丰富、更多元化的车款资讯，分享给观众。

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play!
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: 小姐不熙娣
programme.desc: 由娱乐圈最具女王气势之艺人小S徐熙娣主持，搭档幽默风趣的助理主持人派翠克，每集邀请多位时下最红、最具话题性之艺人及网红上节目，透过小S深厚及麻辣的主持功力，与现场来宾激荡出无敌之「笑果」。

programme.title: 台湾启示录
programme.desc: 探讨新闻事件背后的艰辛内幕，取材涵包括人物故事、历史档案、社会观察，以及时事启发。以最客观的角度带领观众深入探讨事件的发展，致力启迪台湾民众的新思维。

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: 小姐不熙娣
programme.desc: 由娱乐圈最具女王气势之艺人小S徐熙娣主持，搭档幽默风趣的助理主持人派翠克，每集邀请多位时下最红、最具话题性之艺人及网红上节目，透过小S深厚及麻辣的主持功力，与现场来宾激荡出无敌之「笑果」。

programme.title: Taiwan Criminal Files
programme.desc: Discuss the difficult inside story behind the news events, lead the audience to explore the development of the event from an objective perspective, and strive to enlighten the audience's new thinking.

programme.title: 台湾启示录
programme.desc: 探讨新闻事件背后的艰辛内幕，取材涵包括人物故事、历史档案、社会观察，以及时事启发。以最客观的角度带领观众深入探讨事件的发展，致力启迪台湾民众的新思维。

programme.title: ShinyFoodDiary
programme.desc: The host visits various places in a walking and themed way, focusing on what is most fashionable among young people nowadays.Check in on FB and IG to create new highlights and online clicks, not only delicious food, but also in-depth introduction.Introduce the cultural customs and festivals of various places.

programme.title: 打卡吧!我的炫FOOD日记
programme.desc: 由主持人以行脚的方式，主题式的造访各地，以时下年轻人最时兴的FB及IG打卡，创造新亮点及网路点击率，不只美食，也深度介绍各地人文风情与节日祭典等。

programme.title: Hello Doctor
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Chic Cities
programme.desc: Covering consumer shopping information, trendy specialty stores, travel guides, and the LOHAS propositions of trendy people.

programme.title: 乐活好正点
programme.desc: 涵盖消费购物资讯、潮流特色小店、旅游指南和潮人的乐活主张。

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill!
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Hello. Are You Ok ?
programme.desc: Shen Yulin, the well-informed veteran driver VS. Simba Tseng, the quirky new human being.

programme.title: 哈罗 你有事吗
programme.desc: 见多识广老司机沈玉琳 VS. 古灵精怪新人类曾智希 说没事的，都很有事！ 说有事的，没事找事！ 生活里每件小事都是大事！ ！ ！ 跨世代观点交锋，中外文化差异对决，【找事团】突破盲肠、呛辣开喷！支援你解决人生平交道上遭遇的各种疑难事！

programme.title: Travel Together
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.title: 请问今晚住谁家
programme.desc: 真人打工旅游实境节目，每趟旅程由窦智孔、王传一分别领军艺人来宾组成的「型男打工团」， 一起结伴远离都市尘嚣，探访最疗愈的乡间秘境。

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Billionaire Story
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it’s the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: Hot Door Night 24
programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: The Way To Happiness
programme.desc: The difference in values and gulf in life achievements of the Gao brothers result in conflicts and tension between their respective families.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.desc: The hungriest and most ruthless food competition ever! In this groundbreaking show, contestants must embrace the challenge of conquering their hunger to become the ultimate winner. With a relentless pursuit of zero hunger, only the strongest will emerge victorious!

programme.title: 饥饿游戏
programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Way To Happiness
programme.desc: The difference in values and gulf in life achievements of the Gao brothers result in conflicts and tension between their respective families.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the day of Kai-ching taking office as chair, she plans to dismiss Yat-yin. Yat-yin survives the crisis for now as she takes leave. Yat-yin meets up with newly appointed AKL Bank President Tai Tak-kiu. She puts forward some amazing collaboration proposal. Interpol points out the plane crash was most probably not an accident.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: Shining Just for You
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven: Resurrection
programme.desc: Continuing the plot from the previous season of ‘The Escape of the Seven’, the sequel focuses on a man who dreams of becoming a king in a castle built on fake news and the counterattack of seven people escaping evil.

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy!
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Gone With The Rain
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Zodiac HK Hospital Dr Tung Yat-yin, Head, Department of Cardiothoracic Surgery, has performed some extremely difficult operation, establishing an international status for the hospital. Meanwhile, Group Chairman Dr Wong Chun-to (Paul) is getting ready to marry Yat-yin in some ancient castle in Europe.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yat-yin suppresses the news about the Wongs’ private jet crash. The Wong’s third daughter Wong Kai-ching and her husband Pang Kin-pong secretly inform Chun-to’s arch enemy Or Wing-sing as they want Zodiac HK Hospital to stop operating. Yat-yin eventually reveals everything she knows as she is interrogated by Yi-ka and Lai-suet.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] While Yi-ka and Lai-suet are mourning the loss of loved ones, Yat-yin has overcome her sadness as she faces a looming disaster initiated by Zodiac Group. Yat-yin arbitrarily lures senior official Mok Hong-yiu into letting Zodiac Medical City sail through the bidding.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] At the memorial service, Wing-sing abruptly turns up and announces he has gained the support of other shareholders. A special directors’ meeting will be held to reelect members and group chairman. Yat-yin wants to prevent Wing-sing from joining the board of directors, and she needs enough shares to enable her to join the board, so she tries to win Yi-ka and Lai-suet over.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: The Queen of Castle
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the day of Kai-ching taking office as chair, she plans to dismiss Yat-yin. Yat-yin survives the crisis for now as she takes leave. Yat-yin meets up with newly appointed AKL Bank President Tai Tak-kiu. She puts forward some amazing collaboration proposal. Interpol points out the plane crash was most probably not an accident.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: IDOL I
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: Light of Dawn
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。
